name: Western RPG
description:
Time to live out your western adventure!
Are you a simple rancher, maybe a fearless native, a lonesome cowboy? Or maybe just a drunk asshole. Who cares it's 1887 no one is gonna really mind. 

(It's my first bot made for the public, but depending on how this pans out I may end up making more rpgs.)
creator: Starfury
